entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop known scientifically as Pennisetum glaucum

entities.name: ICMR356
entities.description: An elite inbred restorer line of pearl millet released in 1993

entities.name: B282
entities.description: A parental line used in the cross to develop ICMR356

entities.name: J104
entities.description: A parental line used in the cross to develop ICMR356

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area, ranging from 1477 to 3373 kg/ha for ICMR356

entities.name: H77/833-2
entities.description: A pearl millet line used as a benchmark for grain yield comparison

entities.name: D23
entities.description: A pearl millet line used as a benchmark for grain yield comparison

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical measurement of the plant, ranging from 109 to 172 cm for ICMR356

entities.name: FLOWERING REQUIREMENT
entities.description: The duration from planting to flowering, 49 to 54 days for ICMR356

entities.name: BASAL TILLERS
entities.description: The number of tillers produced at the base of the plant, 3-7 for ICMR356

entities.name: 1000-SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of 1000 seeds, 8.5 g for ICMR356

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A fungal disease affecting pearl millet

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes downy mildew

entities.name: P7-04
entities.description: A pearl millet line used as a benchmark for downy mildew resistance comparison

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country where the resistance of ICMR356 to downy mildew was evaluated

entities.name: WESTERN AFRICA
entities.description: A region where the resistance of ICMR356 to downy mildew was evaluated

relationships.description: compared for resistance to downy mildew
